items.title: Clock is ticking for bitcoin to prevent quantum threat as it could drain 6.9 million BTC including Satoshi’s
items.desc: Can a network without formal governance coordinate the biggest cryptographic migration in its history?

items.title: Quantum computer breaks 15-bit elliptic curve cryptographic key
items.desc: The Bitcoin community continues to debate whether cryptographically relevant quantum computers are imminent or decades away.

items.title: Bitcoin 'Q-Day' Draws Nearer as Quantum Researcher Breaks Simplified Key
items.desc: Project Eleven awarded 1 BTC to an Italian researcher after a public quantum computer breaks a 15-bit elliptic curve key, the largest public demonstration of its kind to date.

items.title: Researcher wins 1 bitcoin bounty for 'largest quantum attack' on underlying tech
items.desc: Independent researcher Giancarlo Lelli broke a 15-bit elliptic curve key on publicly accessible quantum hardware, 512 times larger than the previous public demonstration in September 2025.

items.title: Researcher breaks 15-bit elliptic curve key in ‘largest quantum attack,’ wins 1 bitcoin bounty from Project Eleven
items.desc: Independent researcher Giancarlo Lelli derived a 15-bit elliptic curve key on a publicly accessible quantum computer, Project Eleven said.

items.title: US DOJ sentences man to 70 months in prison for role in $263M scam group
items.desc: The group spent tens of millions of dollars on luxury items and real estate, using funds stolen from crypto users in social engineering scams.

items.title: Litecoin rewrites three hours of history to undo its first major privacy-layer exploit
items.desc: Attackers used the more than three-hour fork window to attempt double-spends against cross-chain swap protocols.

items.title: Bitcoiners cast doubt on the US military's understanding of the network
items.desc: Bitcoin advocate Matthew Kratter said US Navy Admiral Samuel Paparo's Senate testimony on Tuesday sounded like it was written by an "intern."

items.title: BlackRock’s bitcoin ETF just hit a massive milestone that proves crypto is now a mainstream bet
items.desc: IBIT options open interest topped Deribit on Friday, signaling rapid institutional adoption of regulated crypto derivatives in the U.S.

items.title: Bitcoin Hit Its Highest Price Since January—Why VanEck Analysts See More Potential Gains
items.desc: Bitcoin hash rate recovery and negative funding rates signal potential gains ahead, according to the ETF provider's latest network analysis.

items.title: Bitcoin at $40,000 would be 'near-unprecedented' statistical outcome, analyst says
items.desc: Mean-reversion models suggest bearish targets imply a 0.4th percentile event, far beyond typical market corrections.

items.title: Aave, Kelp, LayerZero ask Arbitrum DAO to release $71 million in frozen ETH to rsETH recovery effort
items.desc: The standard Constitutional AIP lifecycle runs roughly 49 days from forum publication to onchain execution, a timeline some delegates say is too long.

items.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
items.desc: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

items.title: CFTC sues New York over bid to apply gambling laws to prediction markets
items.desc: The CFTC has filed suit to block New York from enforcing gambling laws on prediction platforms, arguing federal regulators have sole authority over event-based contracts.

items.title: Europe’s banks are going all in on crypto
items.desc: Brahimi explores the impact of European banks' integration of digital assets into their existing brokerage and payments infrastructure in the wake of MiCA.

items.title: Bitcoin traders eye $73K next as weekly trend line holds price hostage
items.desc: Bitcoin market participants favored a short-term return to $73,000 as resistance stayed in place, with some analysis seeing even lower levels.

items.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs see 9-day inflow streak as investors show resilience
items.desc: US spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded $2.12 billion in inflows over nine days, signaling growing conviction among investors.

items.title: Ripple-linked XRP stalls near $1.44 as 'triangle squeeze' nears breakout
items.desc: Price holds in tight range after high-volume move, with compression signaling a decisive move as institutional demand quietly builds.

items.title: Hyperliquid whale holds $38M short against Bitcoin, but does it matter?
items.desc: A Hyperliquid whale holds large short positions against Bitcoin and several altcoins. Does the position provide any signal on the markets’ future outcomes?

items.title: US authorities freeze $344M in crypto linked to Iran
items.desc: The announced crypto freeze came just one day after Tether said it had frozen $344 million of its USDt stablecoin in response to a request from US law enforcement.

items.title: U.S. CFTC adds New York to string of states its suing to stop prediction market pushback
items.desc: The federal regulator has been suing states that seek to curtail prediction markets activity and claim it should be deemed state-regulated gaming.

items.title: Bitcoin developer Paul Sztorc announces BTC hard fork called eCash
items.desc: The hard fork will introduce a new, competing layer-1 blockchain and seven layer-2 scaling networks, according to Sztorc's announcement.

items.title: JPMorgan says tokenization will drive change across entire funds industry, but ‘good use cases’ still years away
items.desc: "Tokenization is that it will become part of the ETF ecosystem, but we’re a couple of years away from some good use cases,” said the bank.

items.title: Bitcoin is on track for its best month in a year. $5 billion USDT growth fuels the rebound
items.desc: Strong earnings season trumps geopolitical risks for now, one trader said, as equities and crypto markets "stopped caring" about Iran war headlines.

items.title: Tennessee Becomes Second State to Outlaw Bitcoin, Crypto ATMs
items.desc: Tennessee has become the second U.S. state to outlaw Bitcoin and crypto ATMs, making it a criminal offense to own or operate the machines.

items.title: Aurelion allocates $48M in tokenized gold to newly launched yield protocol
items.desc: The XAUE protocol lets holders earn yield on tokenized gold through lending and trading strategies while maintaining exposure to the underlying asset.

items.title: VanEck Flags Dual Bullish Signals for Bitcoin as Funding Turns Negative, Hash Rate Slips
items.desc: Bitcoin Magazine VanEck Flags Dual Bullish Signals for Bitcoin as Funding Turns Negative, Hash Rate Slips VanEck says Bitcoin is showing a reinforced bullish setup as deeply negative funding rates and clustered hash rate declines—historically tied to strong forward returns—signal cautious sentiment rather than capitulation. This post VanEck Flags Dual Bullish Signals for Bitcoin as Funding Turns Negative, Hash Rate Slips first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

items.title: Aave proposes 25,000 ETH contribution to DeFi United to plug Kelp DAO exploit hole
items.desc: Protocols and individual DeFi users have collectively pledged enough to cover the Kelp DAO exploit losses.

items.title: Tether's $344 million USDT freeze linked to U.S. 'Economic Fury' against Iran regime
items.desc: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the U.S. is seeking to choke off "all financial lifelines" for the regime.

items.title: Aave DAO Asked to Commit 25,000 ETH to Industry-Wide rsETH Recovery Fund
items.desc: The Aave DAO is voting on a proposal to provide funding to restore Kelp DAO's rsETH product backing after an April 18 bridge incident, as part of a broader DeFi United ecosystem recovery effort.

items.title: Justice Department Ends Probe of Fed Chair Powell, Clearing Path for Warsh Confirmation
items.desc: The Justice Department closed the Jerome Powell probe, removing a barrier to Senate action on Kevin Warsh's Federal Reserve nomination.

items.title: Amazon Web Services Marketplace Adds Chainlink Crypto Oracle Services
items.desc: Amazon’s Chainlink integration lets enterprises connect cloud infrastructure with blockchain networks through familiar AWS tools.

items.title: US sanctions Iran-linked crypto wallets, including addresses holding $344 million frozen by Tether: CNN
items.desc: The move comes a day after Tether froze $344 million worth of USDT, which has now been linked to Iran, CNN reported.

items.title: DOJ Drops Criminal Probe of Fed Chair Powell, Clearing Path for Warsh
items.desc: Bitcoin Magazine DOJ Drops Criminal Probe of Fed Chair Powell, Clearing Path for Warsh The Department of Justice closed its criminal investigation into Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell on Friday. This post DOJ Drops Criminal Probe of Fed Chair Powell, Clearing Path for Warsh first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

items.title: Crypto Biz: Same players, bigger bets as crypto eyes a rebound
items.desc: Familiar players ramp up Bitcoin and Ether bets as markets hint at a rebound, while institutions test blockchain rails and US lawmakers stall on crypto rules this week.

items.title: Bitcoin stays 'stalled' at $78K as oil threatens new risk-asset squeeze
items.desc: Bitcoin and risk assets faced an uphill struggle after the S&P 500 hit new all-time highs as analysis warned that BTC price support was at risk.

items.title: Tennessee bans crypto ATMs statewide, joining Indiana in fraud crackdown
items.desc: The law, which passed unanimously, extends liability beyond crypto ATM operators to businesses hosting the machines.

items.title: Morgan Stanley Targets BlackRock With Money Market Fund for Stablecoin Issuers
items.desc: Morgan Stanley debuted a money market fund intended for stablecoin issuers, billing the product as a way for companies to manage reserves.

items.title: DOJ drops probe into Jerome Powell, paving the way for crypto-friendly Kevin Warsh to lead Fed
items.desc: The DOJ dropped its criminal investigation into Fed Chair Jerome Powell, clearing the way for the Senate to confirm Kevin Warsh.

items.title: AWS Marketplace adds Chainlink data standards, enabling devs to link traditional computing services and blockchains
items.desc: AWS’s Chainlink integration will allow institutions to use familiar AWS tools while connecting securely to blockchains.

items.title: Nakamoto taps Bitwise and Kraken for Bitcoin options strategy to hedge risk
items.desc: Nakamoto launched a Bitcoin derivatives program with Bitwise and Kraken, aiming to generate options premiums and hedge part of its BTC treasury exposure.

items.title: Jane Street asks court to reject Terraform claims tied to UST-LUNA crash
items.desc: A filing Thursday said the lawsuit rehashes events already settled in court and seeks damages for losses caused by internal misconduct.

items.title: Ethereum Foundation sells nearly $24 million of ETH to Tom Lee’s Bitmine
items.desc: Bitmine Immersion also spent about $10 million when it bought 5,000 ETH from the Ethereum Foundation last month.

items.title: Tom Lee's BitMine Buys Another $23 Million in ETH From Ethereum Foundation
items.desc: Top Ethereum treasury firm BitMine Immersion Technologies made its second ETH buy from the Ethereum Foundation.

items.title: Bitmine to buy 10,000 ether for $23.9 million from the Ethereum Foundation
items.desc: The transaction brings the firm’s holdings closer to its 5% of ETH target.

items.title: DeFi Education Fund and other crypto leaders press SEC to lock in DeFi broker guidance
items.desc: The DeFi Education Fund and others are urging the SEC to formalize its recent decentralized finance interface guidance.

items.title: Ethereum Foundation Sells 10,000 ETH to BitMNR at $2,387 Average Price via OTC: Ethereum Foundation
items.desc: The Ethereum Foundation finalized a 10,000 ETH over-the-counter sale to BitMNR at an average price of $2,387 per token.

items.title: South Africa draft bill would tighten crypto capital controls
items.desc: South Africa’s draft capital flow rules would bring crypto under exchange controls, with declaration duties, transaction limits and tougher penalties.

items.title: DeFi United Fundraising Chips Away at Kelp Exploit Shortfall
items.desc: Bybit CEO Ben Zhou pledged his support for Mantle's 30,000 ETH loan proposal.

items.title: 7 Reasons JPX Should Reconsider Its Proposed Digital Asset Exclusion From TOPIX
items.desc: Bitcoin Magazine 7 Reasons JPX Should Reconsider Its Proposed Digital Asset Exclusion From TOPIX A closer look at why JPX's proposed crypto-asset exclusion sits awkwardly inside a rules-based benchmark like TOPIX. This post 7 Reasons JPX Should Reconsider Its Proposed Digital Asset Exclusion From TOPIX first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Nick Ward.

items.title: Lighter Unveils Multi-Asset Margin Starting With ETH
items.desc: Traders can post non-USDC assets as collateral for perps through Unified Trading Accounts, with conservative supply caps at launch.

items.title: Nakamoto (NAKA) Launches Bitcoin Derivatives Program to Capture Volatility Income and Hedge Downside Risk
items.desc: Bitcoin Magazine Nakamoto (NAKA) Launches Bitcoin Derivatives Program to Capture Volatility Income and Hedge Downside Risk Nakamoto Inc. has introduced an actively managed Bitcoin derivatives program designed to earn income from market volatility while limiting downside risk, the company said Friday. This post Nakamoto (NAKA) Launches Bitcoin Derivatives Program to Capture Volatility Income and Hedge Downside Risk first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

items.title: China’s new online marketing rules tighten ban on crypto promotions
items.desc: China’s new online marketing rules tighten an already sweeping crypto ban and place fresh pressure on financial influencers, echoing parallel crackdowns in Europe, Australia and the UK.

items.title: ECB signs standards deals to cut digital euro integration costs
items.desc: The ECB signed deals with three standards bodies to reuse open payment standards for the digital euro and lower integration costs for banks and merchants.

items.title: Metaplanet Issues $50M in Zero-Interest Bonds to Buy More Bitcoin
items.desc: Bitcoin Magazine Metaplanet Issues $50M in Zero-Interest Bonds to Buy More Bitcoin Metaplanet said it will issue ¥8 billion ($50 million) in zero-interest bonds to expand its Bitcoin holdings. This post Metaplanet Issues $50M in Zero-Interest Bonds to Buy More Bitcoin first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

items.title: Zondacrypto CEO goes off radar as Poland probe deepens
items.desc: Polish prosecutors are investigating Zondacrypto over alleged fraud and fund access issues, while local media report that CEO Przemysław Kral is in Israel.

items.title: Fluent launches Ethereum Layer 2 mainnet and BLEND token with $50 million day-one liquidity
items.desc: Fluent launched its Ethereum Layer 2 mainnet alongside its BLEND token and a native stablecoin with $50 million in day-one liquidity.

items.title: Morgan Stanley launches stablecoin reserves fund aligned with GENIUS Act requirements
items.desc: Morgan Stanley launched a government money market fund for stablecoin issuers to hold reserves in line with GENIUS Act requirements.

items.title: Metaplanet raises $50M in zero-interest bonds to buy more Bitcoin
items.desc: Metaplanet raises $50 million through zero-interest bonds from EVO FUND to expand its Bitcoin treasury, extending its capital markets-driven accumulation strategy.

items.title: Aave Leads ‘DeFi United’ Push to Contain $292M KelpDAO Fallout
items.desc: Aave's founder has pledged 5,000 ETH of his own money as a growing DeFi coalition races to contain the fallout from the KelpDAO exploit.

items.title: Bitcoin, dollar move in near-perfect opposition. It hasn't been this extreme in almost 4 years.
items.desc: What you need to know for April 24, 2026

items.title: Bitcoin stalls below at $77,500 as volatility cools, traders unwind leverage
items.desc: BTC holds a tight range as open interest drops, signaling cooling momentum, while altcoins show mixed performance and ZEC attracts fresh bullish interest.

items.title: Michael Saylor says the bitcoin winter is over. Some experts agree, with caveats.
items.desc: Market analyst Mati Greenspan said bitcoin has not gone through a “winter,” rather a pullback within a broader bull market, adding the next leg up for bitcoin will be driven by nation-state adoption.

items.title: Spot bitcoin ETFs draw $2 billion in net inflows over 8-day positive streak
items.desc: Spot bitcoin ETFs logged $223.2 million in net inflows on Thursday, led by $167.5 million into BlackRock's IBIT.

items.title: India pushes e-rupee through welfare pilots as BRICS digital currency plan takes shape
items.desc: Farmers and food programs anchor 10 pilots aimed at boosting usage, while New Delhi eyes BRICS CBDC link ahead of 2026 summit

items.title: Mantle proposes up to 30,000 ETH loan to address Aave bad debt from Kelp exploit
items.desc: The Mantle team wrote that the loan would generate yield and strengthen the relationship between Mantle and Aave.

items.title: Bitcoin Core 31.0 released
items.desc: Bitcoin Core version 31.0 is now available for download. See the release notes for more information about the bug fixes in this release. If you have any questions, please stop by the #bitcoin IRC chatroom (IRC, web) and we’ll do our best to help you.

items.title: Bitcoin Core 31.0 released
items.desc: Bitcoin Core version 31.0 is now available for download. See the release notes for more information about the bug fixes in this release. If you have any questions, please stop by the #bitcoin IRC chatroom (IRC, web) and we’ll do our best to help you.
